name: Freddie's Coquito (Creamy Tropical Liqueur)
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces Bacardi white rum (4 to 6 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure all ingredients into a blender or food processor.
2. Blend until smooth and well combined.
3. Transfer mixture to an airtight container.
4. Refrigerate the coquito until ready to serve, about 2 hours.
5. About half an hour before serving, remove from refrigerator.
6. Warm slightly - Freddie suggests warming on the back of a computer monitor for optimum temperature.
7. Serve chilled.
WARNING: Do not aggressively heat or scald ingredients. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat".
